SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-19-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-11-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. REPRESENTATIVE FOR THE DEFENDANT ACE DRILLING & EXCAVATION MBN 178 INFORMS THE COURT THAT THE PRESIDENT OF THE COMPANY IS OUT OF THE COUNTRY AND REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE. THE CONTINUANCE ALSO CURES THE UNTIMELY SERVICE ON DEFENDANT ACE DRILLING & EXCAVATION MBN 178. PLAINTIFF SHIRLEY MACK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ACE DRILLING & EXCAVATION MBN 178 IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY,GRAINNE CHURRAOIN, PERSON ASSISTANT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, BY RYON HAYWARD, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. DEFENDANT ACE DRILLING & EXCAVATION MBN 178 REQUEST FOR A SECOND CONTINUANCE IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF SHIRLEY MACK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ACE DRILLING & EXCAVATION MBN 178 IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY, GRAINNE CHURRAOIN, PERSON ASSISTANT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, BY RYON HAYWARD, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACK, SHIRLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACE DRILLING & EXCAVATION MBN 178 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,036.66 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,176.66 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
